title: OKPF License
description: Licensing terms for an OKPF knowledge pack.

spdx_expression.description: SPDX license expression. Use 'LicenseRef-custom' for non-SPDX licenses.

scope.description: Granular permissions for different use cases.

use.description: Permission to use the knowledge for personal or professional purposes.

ai_training.description: Permission to use pack content as AI/ML training data.

commercial_use.description: Permission for commercial use of the pack or its contents.

attribution_required.description: Whether attribution to the original contributors is required.

attribution_text.description: The attribution text that must be included when using or redistributing.

full_text_url.description: URL to the full license text.

custom_terms.description: Additional licensing terms beyond the SPDX license expression.

effective_date.description: ISO 8601 date from which this license applies.

expiry_date.description: ISO 8601 date after which this license expires (if applicable).

per_artifact.description: Per-artifact license overrides (for packs with mixed licensing).

artifact_id.description: The content artifact ID this override applies to.

spdx_expression.description: SPDX license expression for this artifact.
